# HoundShield — AI Compliance Firewall

> HoundShield is the local-only AI compliance firewall for defense contractors, healthcare organizations, and regulated industries. It intercepts AI prompts before they leave your network, scans for sensitive data (CUI, PHI, PII), and generates tamper-proof audit evidence for compliance auditors.

## What HoundShield Does

HoundShield solves a critical compliance problem: employees at defense contractors and healthcare organizations are using cloud-based AI tools (ChatGPT, Copilot, Claude, Gemini) with sensitive data in their prompts. This creates regulatory violations — CMMC Level 2, HIPAA, SOC 2 — because that data travels to third-party servers outside the organization's control.

HoundShield works as a transparent local proxy. Organizations change one URL: instead of pointing AI tools directly at api.openai.com or api.anthropic.com, they point them at their HoundShield endpoint. Every prompt is scanned in under 10ms. Prompts containing CUI, PHI, or PII are blocked and logged. Clean prompts pass through normally. Every decision creates an immutable, tamper-evident log entry.

## Who This Is For

- **IT Security Managers** at 50-500 person DoD defense contractors preparing for CMMC Level 2 certification
- **ISSOs (Information Systems Security Officers)** responsible for NIST 800-171 compliance
- **CISOs at healthcare organizations** needing HIPAA-compliant AI usage
- **MSPs and C3PAO consultants** managing compliance for multiple clients
- **CTOs at regulated SaaS companies** needing SOC 2 Type II AI controls

## Key Features

- **Local-only deployment**: All scanning happens on your infrastructure. Zero data leaves your network. This is what makes it CMMC-compliant.
- **Sub-10ms scanning**: 200+ CUI, PHI, and PII detection patterns. No performance impact on AI workflows.
- **C3PAO-ready PDF reports**: Export tamper-evident compliance evidence in PDF format that C3PAO assessors can review on-site.
- **NIST 800-171 control mapping**: Every blocked prompt is mapped to the specific NIST 800-171 control it protects.
- **CMMC Level 2 gap analysis**: Built-in ShieldReady assessment covering all 110 CMMC Level 2 practices.
- **HIPAA audit trails**: Tamper-evident logs of all AI usage for HIPAA compliance documentation.
- **SOC 2 monitoring**: Real-time AI usage monitoring for SOC 2 Type II audit evidence.
- **One URL change**: No agent installation on individual machines. One network-level change covers the entire organization.
- **Docker deployment**: Full self-hosted deployment in under 10 minutes with Docker.

## Compliance Coverage

- **CMMC Level 2** — All 110 NIST 800-171 Rev 2 controls, with specific support for:
  - AC.2.006 (Control CUI flow enforcement)
  - SC.3.177 (Employ cryptographic mechanisms)
  - AU.2.042 (Create and retain audit logs)
  - SI.1.210 (Identify, report, and correct information flaws)
- **HIPAA** — PHI detection, BAA support, audit trail generation
- **SOC 2 Type II** — AI usage controls, incident detection, audit evidence
- **NIST 800-171** — Full 110-control coverage with SPRS score tracking

## Pricing

All plans include local-only deployment and tamper-evident logging.

- **Starter** — Free. Basic scanning, 10K requests/month.
- **Pro** — $69/month. Advanced scanning, PDF evidence export, CMMC controls, 100K requests/month.
- **Growth** — $199/month. Multi-user, gateway mode, SPRS score tracking, 1M requests/month.
- **Enterprise** — $499/month. C3PAO-ready reports, dedicated support, unlimited requests.
- **Agency** — Custom. Multi-tenant dashboard for MSPs managing multiple clients.

## Technical Details

- **Stack**: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Supabase, Docker
- **Deployment**: Self-hosted via Docker (local-only), or managed via HoundShield cloud dashboard
- **AI compatibility**: Any OpenAI API-compatible service (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, open-source LLMs)
- **Scanning engine**: Pattern-matching against 200+ CUI/PHI/PII indicators, extensible rule system
- **Audit format**: SHA-256 hash chain, tamper-evident append-only log, PDF export via jsPDF
- **Integration**: Single URL change — no code changes, no per-machine agent installation

## Competitive Context

- **vs Nightfall** ($75K/yr): Cloud-based — CMMC non-compliant for CUI. HoundShield is local-only.
- **vs Cloudflare AI Gateway**: Free but cloud-based — same CMMC compliance problem. HoundShield is local-only.
- **vs Manual policy**: Unenforceable. HoundShield provides technical control + evidence, not just policy.
